meta.title: Federico Moretto | Full-stack developer
meta.description: Federico Moretto's portfolio: full-stack development, technical support, hotfixes, and new features for real production systems.
meta.ogDescription: I build and maintain software for real environments, focused on stability, clarity, and product evolution.
hero.title: I build and maintain software for real operating environments
hero.description: I work on production products where stability, technical support, and system evolution matter every single day.
hero.secondary: I am currently part of Asince SRL, contributing to fintech and ERP platforms through hotfixes, maintenance, and new features.
hero.proofPoints: I work with incidents, hotfixes, and improvements on production systems.
I combine technical support with new feature development.
I prioritize clear interfaces and maintainable code over unnecessary complexity.
I am comfortable moving between product, operations, and business needs.
hero.brandCard.title: Useful, stable, understandable software
hero.brandCard.description: My focus is solving real problems with a solid technical base and a clean experience for the people who use the product every day.

hero.signalCards.title: Asince SRL
hero.signalCards.description: Technical support and development across fintech and ERP platforms, with a strong focus on operational continuity.

hero.signalCards.title: .NET, TypeScript and Azure
hero.signalCards.description: I work with APIs, databases, web interfaces, and cloud services that need to stay reliable.

hero.signalCards.title: Clarity over noise
hero.signalCards.description: I aim for maintainable solutions, sound product judgment, and communication that is easy to follow.

about.subtitle: Profile
about.title: A technical profile that understands product, support, and business
about.description: My path moved from technical support into full-stack development, and that still shapes how I approach problems today: first I understand the context, then I prioritize a clear and sustainable solution.
At Asince SRL I work on systems that people already depend on. That taught me to respond to incidents, protect stability, and add features without losing sight of the teams using the product.
about.highlights: I can enter existing codebases quickly and prioritize low-risk changes.
I translate tickets, operational issues, and business rules into concrete solutions.
I value restrained, clear UI over decorative effects that add friction.
I want each technical decision to leave the product better prepared to grow.
about.sideCards.currentRoleDescription: I move between debugging, maintenance, and new features with a strong focus on reliability.
about.sideCards.approachDescription: I do not only think about whether something works. I also think about how it is maintained, explained, and used day to day.
skills.subtitle: Capabilities
skills.title: Technology with a reason behind it
skills.description: A stack oriented toward building, maintaining, and improving real products, not isolated demos.

skills.groups.title: Product interfaces
skills.groups.description: Clear UI, reusable components, and responsive web experiences.

skills.groups.title: Backend and data
skills.groups.description: Business logic, APIs, and persistence for systems that need reliability.

skills.groups.title: Operations and collaboration
skills.groups.description: Technical work connected to deployment, support, and cross-functional teams.

skills.highlights: I can work on new code or on existing systems without losing reading speed.
I am comfortable improving product while keeping the operational base stable.
I aim for technical decisions that reduce friction for users, support, and future changes.
Once something reaches production, I care about its maintenance as much as its delivery.
works.subtitle: Experience
works.title: I work on software that is already being used
works.description: Experience in technical support, maintenance, and product development for contexts where stability truly matters.

works.items.summary: I work on production fintech and ERP platforms, combining incident response with functional product evolution.
achievements: Analysis and resolution of technical tickets on real operating environments.
Implementation of hotfixes and low-risk adjustments to maintain continuity.
Monitoring of services, databases, and infrastructure tied to the product.
Development of new features aligned with business needs.

works.items.summary: I designed and launched websites and tools for small businesses, prioritizing clarity, client autonomy, and digital presence.
achievements: Built responsive websites and experiences designed to generate inquiries.
Automated administrative tasks to reduce manual work.
Supported non-technical clients on content, structure, and iterative improvements.
Created solutions that were simple to maintain and easy to understand.

contact.subtitle: Contact
contact.title: Let's build something useful and maintainable
contact.description: I am open to remote opportunities, collaborations, and conversations centered on product, stability, and continuous improvement.
If my profile fits your team or project, feel free to email me, review my resume, or reach out through LinkedIn.
